currentGate.nextCommand: npm run gateforge:secret-replacement-packet, then replace the listed local secret values and rerun npm run gateforge:hosted-readiness-doctor.

steps.action: Provision hosted staging control-plane Postgres.
evidenceRequired: Provider database identifier and sanitized successful hosted health gate output.

steps.action: Provision tenant database admin access for staging.
evidenceRequired: Hosted tenant provision/delete test output and sanitized DB-per-tenant proof.

steps.action: Set CONTROL_PLANE_DATABASE_URL in the local secret pack and GitHub Actions.
evidenceRequired: Local secret files check PASS and GitHub secret name present.

steps.action: Set TENANT_DB_ADMIN_URL in the local secret pack and GitHub Actions.
evidenceRequired: Hosted strict live DB tests PASS.

steps.action: Set TENANT_DB_HOST in the local secret pack and GitHub Actions.
evidenceRequired: Local secret files check READY and hosted tenant routing proof.

steps.action: Create staging Sentry or equivalent error-monitoring project.
evidenceRequired: Sanitized project reference and alert proof attached to hosted attestation.

steps.action: Set SENTRY_DSN for staging.
evidenceRequired: Hosted strict monitoring item PASS.

steps.action: Create uptime monitor for /health.
evidenceRequired: Monitor URL, screenshot/log reference, and successful health gate.

steps.action: Set UPTIME_HEALTHCHECK_URL.
evidenceRequired: GateForge secret check READY and hosted attestation item PASS.

steps.action: Set ALERT_EMAIL_TO for staging operations.
evidenceRequired: Alert delivery proof in hosted evidence packet.

steps.action: Set ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL for staging alerts.
evidenceRequired: Cron/webhook failure alert proof.

steps.action: Create Resend staging key or approved transactional email provider key.
evidenceRequired: Provider test send and DNS posture evidence.

steps.action: Set RESEND_API_KEY.
evidenceRequired: Hosted strict email readiness evidence.

steps.action: Verify sender domain and set EMAIL_FROM.
evidenceRequired: SPF/DKIM/DMARC evidence and provider verified sender.

steps.action: Set EMAIL_REPLY_TO.
evidenceRequired: Transactional provider config proof.

steps.action: Create capped Anthropic staging key.
evidenceRequired: Provider-side cap proof and AI gateway hosted smoke evidence.

steps.action: Run local secret replacement packet after operator values exist.
evidenceRequired: 45_secret_replacement_packet.md lists every runtime and attestation secret without values.
Local secret files check reports every runtime secret READY and at least one attestation option READY.
steps.unblockEvidence: All runtime secret files and one attestation option are READY without printing values.

steps.action: Generate hosted staging attestation packet from real evidence only.
evidenceRequired: hosted-staging-attestation.json validates with external-check.
Attestation references live hosted evidence for DB, observability, email, AI cap, and smoke checks.
steps.unblockEvidence: Hosted staging attestation packet exists, is sanitized, and validates.

steps.action: Encode validated attestation as the preferred B64 secret.
evidenceRequired: 46_attestation_secret_pack.md reports READY without printing the packet value.
At least one attestation local secret file is READY.
steps.unblockEvidence: Hosted staging attestation packet exists, is sanitized, and validates.

steps.action: Upload local secret pack to GitHub Actions after validation.
evidenceRequired: 39_github_secrets_presence_audit.md reports READY.
40_missing_github_secrets_remediation.md reports READY or no missing runtime/attestation secrets.
steps.unblockEvidence: All runtime secret files and one attestation option are READY without printing values.

steps.action: Trigger GateForge Hosted Staging Strict.
evidenceRequired: 41_hosted_strict_trigger_attempt.md reports TRIGGERED or dry-run readiness in smoke.
Hosted Staging Strict GitHub workflow completes successfully with sanitized artifact upload.
steps.unblockEvidence: GitHub Actions has all runtime secrets and one hosted attestation secret.

results.evidence: The moat board still tracks 165 actions.
Open P0 scope is exactly GF-001..GF-016 plus GF-017, GF-018, GF-019, GF-021, GF-022.
Open state counts match the current 144/21 split.
Operator packet covers all 16 external blockers at LOCAL_SECRET_PENDING.
Every external blocker has secrets, validation commands, evidence requirements, and next action.
Dependency chain covers the five remaining hosted-secret gates.
Readiness contract confirms local-only approval is not allowed.
Source artifacts confirm no secrets printed, no production mutation, and no source dumps.
Terminal runbook has one ordered row for every open P0 blocker.
